parties.name: ZHANG, SOPHIE THE GRADUATE COLLEGE PRINCETON, NJ 08544

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and Issuance of Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Sophie Zhang present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for gender change from male to female.
Order for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate signed in open court.
